display.purpose: Hero name only. The largest text on the site.

title.purpose: Job titles, project names, article titles.

label.purpose: Command prompts, dates, metadata, tags, footer.

shadows.name: card-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Diffuse phosphor glow on project card hover. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-expo-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions and entrance animations.

motion.name: spring-nav
motion.purpose: Nav active indicator slide. Framer Motion spring.

motion.name: link-underline
motion.purpose: Sliding underline on link hover. scaleX(0) to scaleX(1), transform-origin left.

components.name: Terminal Window
components.description: The signature component. Title bar with traffic-light dots + body panel.
components.html:
bash
$ whoami
mohanad-fteha
components.css: .ds-terminal { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 14px; } .ds-terminal-bar { background: oklch(0.19 0.008 260); border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0.008 260); border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; padding: 10px 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-terminal-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-dot-red { background: oklch(0.63 0.19 25 / 0.8); } .ds-dot-yellow { background: oklch(0.82 0.155 80 / 0.8); } .ds-dot-green { background: oklch(0.75 0.19 152 / 0.8); } .ds-terminal-label { color: oklch(0.52 0.008 160); font-size: 12px; margin-left: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-terminal-body { background: oklch(0.16 0.006 250); border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0.008 260); border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px; padding: 24px 40px; } .ds-prompt { color: oklch(0.52 0.008 160); } .ds-cmd { color: oklch(0.75 0.19 152); } .ds-output { color: oklch(0.9 0.006 250); padding-left: 16px; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Card for showcasing projects. Subtle border, green glow on hover.
components.html:
*

mini-osb

2026-05

A mini Open Service Broker that provisions real Kubernetes pods.
components.css: .ds-project-card { background: oklch(0.16 0.006 250 / 0.6); border: 1px solid oklch(0.21 0.008 260); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px 24px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-project-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.27 0.008 260); box-shadow: 0 0 24px -8px oklch(0.75 0.19 152 / 0.08); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-commit-dot { color: oklch(0.82 0.155 80); font-size: 12px; } .ds-card-title { color: oklch(0.9 0.006 250); font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.5vw, 1.2rem); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-card-date { color: oklch(0.52 0.008 160); font-size: 12px; } .ds-card-desc { color: oklch(0.68 0.006 250); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 60ch; }

components.name: Tech Tag
components.description: Inline tag for technology labels. Cyan tinted.
components.css: .ds-tech-tag { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(0.78 0.11 195); background: oklch(0.78 0.11 195 / 0.05); border: 1px solid oklch(0.78 0.11 195 / 0.1); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-tech-tag:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.11 195 / 0.1); border-color: oklch(0.78 0.11 195 / 0.2); }

components.name: PR Badge
components.description: Pull request number badge. Purple tinted.
components.css: .ds-pr-badge { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(0.7 0.15 300); background: oklch(0.7 0.15 300 / 0.08); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-pr-badge:hover { background: oklch(0.7 0.15 300 / 0.15); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Navigation link with animated active indicator.
components.html: aboutexperienceprojects
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 12px; } .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(0.52 0.008 160); padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; position: relative; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.68 0.006 250); } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(0.75 0.19 152); } .ds-nav-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: oklch(0.75 0.19 152 / 0.1); border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: External Link
components.description: Text link with sliding underline on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.7 0.14 260); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: currentColor; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-link:hover { color: oklch(0.78 0.11 195); } .ds-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.overview:
A CRT monitor in a dim room. Warm phosphor green glows against deep, blue-tinted black. Scanlines pulse at the edge of perception. Every character is deliberate; every command produces a result. The monitor is the interface.

This system rejects generic dev portfolio templates, over-designed agency sites, plain GitHub READMEs rendered as websites, and cookie-cutter terminal themes. The terminal metaphor is an identity choice; it says "I live in the command line" without being gimmicky.
keyCharacteristics: Phosphor warmth: all neutrals tinted, never pure gray
Structural precision: components as well-machined parts
Atmospheric depth: noise + scanline + radial glow
Varied animation: per-section personality, unified expo easing
Selective restraint: bold where it matters, quiet everywhere else

rules.name: The No Pure Gray Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries chroma 0.005-0.008 tinted toward the brand hue (250-260). Pure gray is dead; tinted neutrals are alive.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Each accent has exactly one role. Green is commands. Cyan is technical content. Yellow is headings. Blue is links. Purple is PRs. Red is errors.

rules.name: The Mono Commitment Rule
rules.body: One family for everything. Size and weight do the hierarchy work, not font switching.

rules.name: The Breathing Room Rule
rules.body: Body line-height is 1.7, not 1.5. Light text on dark backgrounds needs more air. Cap body lines at 65ch.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only shadow is the project card hover glow, reinforcing the phosphor metaphor.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color values.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue at chroma 0.005-0.008.
Do use the expo easing curve cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for all transitions.
Do keep body text at max 65ch and 1.7 line-height.
Do vary section padding for rhythm.
donts: Don't use generic dev portfolio templates.
Don't add gratuitous parallax, 3D blobs, or style-over-substance effects.
Don't use cookie-cutter terminal green without the phosphor warmth shift.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.
Don't add a second font family.
Don't use em dashes in any copy.
Don't make every section the same width.
